description: Create kernel/evolution/graph_advisor.py that proposes structural graph changes based on goal, skills, history, and metrics. Integrate into reflector.
steps: Create kernel/evolution/graph_advisor.py with class GraphAdvisor: (a) __init__(graph_executor, evolution_metrics), (b) suggest_graph_changes(goal, skills_loaded, history, metrics) -> list[dict] that returns proposed structural changes. Logic rules: if goal contains UI/design/frontend keywords AND no 'design' node exists in graph -> propose add_node 'design' between plan and code; if review node passes first time consistently (success_rate > 0.9 over 5+ samples) -> propose remove_node to speed up iteration; if code->test loops > 3 times on average (from metrics) -> propose add_node 'design' between plan and code. Each proposal has confidence_score (0.9 threshold for structural changes) and type (add_node/remove_node/reorder).

Modify kernel/reflector.py: add optional graph_advisor parameter to __init__. In a new method suggest_graph_evolution(state, metrics) -> list[dict], call graph_advisor.suggest_graph_changes() if advisor is available.
The evolution engine already handles add_node/remove_node - just ensure the proposals from graph_advisor have the right format (matching what apply_change expects)

Create tests/test_graph_advisor.py with tests: UI goal triggers design node proposal, high review success triggers removal proposal, high code-test loop triggers design insertion, no proposals when conditions not met, confidence thresholds are correct (0.9 for structural), proposals have correct format for evolution engine
Run tests to confirm everything passes
acceptance_criteria: UI-related goals trigger design node proposals when no design node exists
Consistently passing review nodes trigger removal proposals
High code-test loop counts trigger design step proposals
All proposals use 0.9 confidence threshold for structural changes
Proposals are formatted correctly for the evolution engine
All new tests pass with coverage >= 90%
findings: All 28 graph advisor tests pass. Full suite 795 tests pass at 98.94% coverage. graph_advisor.py at 100% coverage. Reflector integration adds optional graph_advisor param without breaking existing tests.
